write a fibonacci function
❯ write a fibonacci function
⠋ Thinking...⠙ Thinking...⠹ Thinking...
Here's a Fibonacci function in Go:

```go
// Fibonacci returns the nth Fibonacci number.
// Uses iterative approach for O(n) time, O(1) space.
func Fibonacci(n int) int {
	if n <= 1 {
		return n
	}
	a, b := 0, 1
	for i := 2; i <= n; i++ {
		a, b = b, a+b
	}
	return b
}
```

And here's a table of the first 10 values:

| n  | Fib(n) |
|----|--------|
| 0  | 0      |
| 1  | 1      |
| 2  | 1      |
| 3  | 2      |
| 4  | 3      |
| 5  | 5      |
| 6  | 8      |
| 7  | 13     |
| 8  | 21     |
| 9  | 34     |

The iterative approach avoids the exponential blowup of naive recursion.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

❯
